name: Profiterolis
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water, salt, and butter to a boil in a large pot.
2. Gradually add the flour all at once while stirring vigorously until the dough forms a ball and leaves the sides of the pan.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Stir in each egg one at a time until fully incorporated.
5. Drop choux paste by teaspoons onto a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 250°F (130°C) and bake an additional 15 minutes.
End of recipe.
